name: Ozbal Celik Boru Sanayi Ticaret ve Taahhut Anonim Sirketi
summary: Ozbal Celik Boru Sanayi Ticaret ve Taahhut Anonim Sirketi manufactures and sells spiral welded steel pipes in Turkey. The company's steel pipes are used in various areas, including oil pipe lines, gas distribution lines, water distribution lines, foundation stakes, industrial pipe networks, steel structures, pressurized air lines, conveying liquid hydrocarbon in refineries, conveying high temperature water, and storing applications for hydrocarbons. It also provides spiral welded pipes that are used in natural gas, oil and water pipe lines, ports, pile pipe lines, and general purposes. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Mersin, Turkey. Ozbal Celik Boru Sanayi Ticaret ve Taahhut Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of Erciyas Holding A.S.
